1 为集群节点 SSH 访问生成密钥对 使用密钥对以core用户身份 SSH 进入 FCOS 节点
--> 安装操作节点
    [root@bastion ~]# ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 4096 -N '' -f ~/.ssh/id_rsa

启动 ssh-agent 进程为后台任务
    [root@bastion ~]# eval "$(ssh-agent -s)"
将 SSH 私钥添加到 ssh-agent
    [root@bastion ~]# ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_rsa
查看生成的ssh公钥，后续需要复制到install-config.yaml文件的sshKey字段
    [root@bastion ~]# cat /root/.ssh/id_rsa.pub
ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIGNL0cmNQsyMTFCSDZcGfvXuQVUwHLtkXzAAzn3Ze0gk u588@sina.com


2 查看harbor CA证书信息，后续需要复制到install-config.yaml文件的additionalTrustBundle字段
    [root@bastion ~]# cat /opt/harbor/cert/ca.crt

3 查看harbor仓库登录密钥，使用jq将密钥压缩为一行，后续需要复制到install-config.yaml文件的pullSecret字段
    root@bastion:~# cat /opt/okd-install/4.10.0/pull-secret.json|jq -c

4 手动创建安装配置文件，必须命名为install-config.yaml
cat > install-config.yaml <<EOF
apiVersion: v1
baseDomain: tsdc.io
compute:
- hyperthreading: Enabled
  name: worker
  replicas: 0
controlPlane:
  hyperthreading: Enabled
  name: master
  replicas: 3
metadata:
  name: okd
networking:
  clusterNetwork:
  - cidr: 10.18.0.0/16
    hostPrefix: 24
  networkType: OVNKubernetes
  serviceNetwork:
  - 172.30.0.0/16
platform:
  none: {}
fips: false
pullSecret: '{"auths":{"cloud.openshift.com":{"auth":"b3BlbnNoaWZ0LXJlbGVhc2UtZGV2K29jbV9hY2Nlc3NfYTQ3ZmNjODdkZjJlNDg3MWEzYzBjNTU4ODBlMDI4OTY6UkpaVFIySlZRQ0NTVlAyTFZMRTRLNjRTV1ZZT1ZPQTM0VldESVVKSEdEUzkzT0VRUDVJSUtHODZVNjc0QVJRUg==","email":"u588@sina.com"},"quay.io":{"auth":"b3BlbnNoaWZ0LXJlbGVhc2UtZGV2K29jbV9hY2Nlc3NfYTQ3ZmNjODdkZjJlNDg3MWEzYzBjNTU4ODBlMDI4OTY6UkpaVFIySlZRQ0NTVlAyTFZMRTRLNjRTV1ZZT1ZPQTM0VldESVVKSEdEUzkzT0VRUDVJSUtHODZVNjc0QVJRUg==","email":"u588@sina.com"},"registry.connect.redhat.com":{"auth":"","email":"u588@sina.com"},"registry.redhat.io":{"auth":"","email":"u588@sina.com"},"registry.tsdc.io:443":{"auth":"dHM6MTIzNDVAUXdlcnQ=","email":"ts@163.com"}}}'
